name: GIPF
author: Abstract Games factory
description: GIPF (Kris Burm, 1997) -- the namesake of the GIPF Project. On a hexagonal board of 37 spots ringed by 24 entry dots, each turn you introduce a piece from your reserve onto an entry dot and shove it one step inward, sliding the line of pieces ahead of it. A line of four or more of your colour is removed: your pieces return to your reserve, the opponent's in that line are captured. Run out of reserve pieces and you lose. Basic game (single pieces).
